description: Hung-up on the retro denim fad that's making a comeback? These pair of heels from catwalk indulge you with their distressed denim upper referencing the fashion era gone by and nailing the one that's just arrived! Wear this with distressed or faded denim jackets, denim skirts or trousers and an understated floral blouse. Heels: 3"UpperFabric upper with distressed denim effects along the midsole to the heel and on the frontSequin work on the upperStitch detailing for good shoe structureOutsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves on the heel and forefoot Brand badge on the midfootShoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
